FROM Student s
WHERE s.StuID NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT h.StuID

    JOIN Pets p ON h.PetID = p.PetID
    WHERE LOWER(p.PetType) = 'cat'
);"}

final.final_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.StuID
FROM Student s
WHERE s.StuID NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT h.StuID
    FROM Has_Pet h
    JOIN Pets p ON h.PetID = p.PetID
    WHERE LOWER(p.PetType) = 'cat'
);
